recommendations.title: Loving Only You
recommendations.overview: Lukewarm wedding acquires a new meaning when the father of the groom rekindles his long-time love for the mother of the bride.

recommendations.title: The Romantics
recommendations.overview: Alliances are tested when seven college pals reunite to watch two of their own say “I do” at a seaside wedding. But the maid of honor and the groom share a passionate history, and the bride isn’t the only one who’s wondering if it’s all in the past.

recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: The passionate love between a former boxer and a beautiful blind woman.

recommendations.title: Wedding Unplanned
recommendations.overview: When she discovers a wedding planer's business card, Alexia instantly says, "YES" to Mathias unaware that it belongs to his mistress. The groom is now trapped between his bride, and his lover who in charge of his unwanted marriage.

recommendations.title: La Maison en Petits Cubes
recommendations.overview: La Maison en Petits Cubes tells the story of a grandfather's memories as he adds more blocks to his house to stem the flooding waters.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
recommendations.overview: After a crippling injury leaves her husband impotent, Lady Chatterly is torn between her love for her husband and her physical desires. With her husband's consent, she seeks out other means of fulfilling her needs.

recommendations.title: Geography Club
recommendations.overview: A coming-of-age movie that tells a story unfolding in every high school around the country -- a story of kids hiding their true identities in plain sight, even as they feverishly pursue their hearts' desires.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley
recommendations.overview: After a crippling injury leaves her husband impotent, Lady Chatterly is torn between her love for her husband and her physical desires. With her husband's consent, she seeks out other means of fulfilling her needs.

recommendations.title: Surviving Picasso
recommendations.overview: The passionate Merchant-Ivory drama tells the story of Francoise Gilot, the only lover of Pablo Picasso who was strong enough to withstand his ferocious cruelty and move on with her life.

recommendations.title: Onegin
recommendations.overview: A virtuous and passionate girl falls in love with a cynical but a dashing aristocrat.
